message:
Expand fcp-cli: doctor self-check flag, limits.rs scaffolding, forbidden caps

doctor: Add --self-check flag that runs connector self-checks when
combined with --connector. Validates that self-checks require at least
one connector specified. Update tests for new flag behavior.

new: Generate a limits.rs module in new connector projects containing
placeholder constants (MAX_MESSAGE_CHARS, MAX_ATTACHMENTS, etc.) that
connector authors fill in with real API limits. Add corresponding
lib.rs re-export.

install: Set "system.exec" as a forbidden capability in the default
connector manifest template, matching the security posture change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
